holdings.infoBox: VPX is an equity ETF with a total of 92 individual holdings. The top holdings are Vanguard Total Stock Market ETF stock at 19.65%, Broadcom at 3.86%, NVIDIA at 3.72%, Micron Technology at 3.61%, and Exxon Mobil at 3.45%.

overview.description: The Variant Perception Cycle Aware US Equity ETF (VPX) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund is actively managed to select large-cap US companies based on a proprietary analysis of quality and behavioral factors.  The fund also allocates cash using a quantitative model to assess macroeconomic risk. VPX was launched on Mar 11, 2026 and is issued by Variant Perception.
